# Интер Стар Џамбо

Интер Стар Џамбо is the largest toy store in Kumanovo, North Macedonia, operating since 2004.

## What we sell
Toys for children of all ages from internationally recognized brands:
- LEGO (construction sets, all themes)
- Barbie and fashion dolls
- Bruder (scale model vehicles)
- Clementoni (puzzles and educational toys)
- Paw Patrol
- Kikka Boo (baby toys and accessories)
- Nip

## Location & Contact
- Address: Народна Револуција 43, Куманово, Македонија
- Phone: +389 31 422 656
- Email: info@interstarjumbo.mk
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 09:00–21:00, Sunday closed

## Online Store
- Website: https://interstarjumbo.com
- Catalog: https://interstarjumbo.com/catalog
- Delivery: Nationwide across North Macedonia
- Payment: Cash on delivery (COD) — pay when you receive the package
- Gift wrapping: Available free of charge on request

## Key pages
- /catalog — full product catalog with search and filters
- /uslovi-za-isporaka — delivery terms
- /politika-za-vrakanje — returns policy
